summary: Great‑sounding recording despite mixed feelings about the performance
review: Reviewers compliment the audio quality, calling it a great recording that captures the band sounding right, though one reviewer notes the performance itself wasn’t stellar. A second comment laments taping legalities rather than the music. Overall the sound is praised while the show details remain vague.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with opposing star ratings; recording quality is praised but no concrete information on the musical performance, leading to an average overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer describes the tape as a 'great recording' that makes the band sound right; no details on whether it is soundboard, audience, or matrix.
